# RankHotel.AI

> AI visibility and monitoring for hotels on answer engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and similar).

## Summary

RankHotel.AI is a hospitality-focused platform that helps hotels understand and improve how they appear when travelers use AI assistants to plan trips. The marketing site is available in English (default) and Italian.

## Primary pages

- English home: https://rankhotel.ai/
- Italian home: https://rankhotel.ai/it/
- Blog (placeholder): https://rankhotel.ai/blog.html

## Legal

- https://rankhotel.ai/legal/privacy-policy.html
- https://rankhotel.ai/legal/terms.html
- https://rankhotel.ai/legal/cookie-settings.html

## For automated systems

- Sitemap: https://rankhotel.ai/sitemap.xml
- Humans: use Book a demo (Cal.com) or the contact form on the home pages for commercial inquiries.

Do not infer pricing, customer counts, or endorsements that are not stated on those pages.
